Uses of Class
com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder.GenerateContentRequestBuilder

  • Packages that use GenerateContentRequestBuilder 
    Package Description
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder
    Provides classes for building resource instances.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.impl
    Provides implementations for Gemini API resource interfaces.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.spec
    Provides specifications and interfaces for Gemini API resources.

    • Uses of GenerateContentRequestBuilder in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder

      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder that return GenerateContentRequestBuilder 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      GenerateContentRequestBuilder ContentBuilder.and()
      Sets the built Content instance as the system instruction in the parent builder.
      GenerateContentRequestBuilder GenerationConfigBuilder.and()
      Sets the built GenerationConfig instance as the generation config in the parent builder.
      GenerateContentRequestBuilder SafetySettingBuilder.and()
      Adds the built SafetySetting instance to the parent builder and returns to the parent builder for continued chaining.
      GenerateContentRequestBuilder ToolBuilder.and()
      Adds the built Tool instance to the list of tools in the parent builder.
      GenerateContentRequestBuilder ToolConfigBuilder.and()
      Sets the built ToolConfig instance as the tool config in the parent builder.
      static GenerateContentRequestBuilder GenerateContentRequestBuilder.builder​(GeminiClient geminiClient)
      Creates a new instance of the GenerateContentRequestBuilder.
      GenerateContentRequestBuilder GenerateContentRequestBuilder.withCachedContent​(String cachedContent)
      Sets the optional cached content name for the generation request.
      GenerateContentRequestBuilder GenerateContentRequestBuilder.withGenerationConfig​(GenerationConfig generationConfig)
      Sets the optional generation configuration for the generation request.
      GenerateContentRequestBuilder GenerateContentRequestBuilder.withSafetySetting​(SafetySetting safetySetting)
      Adds a safety setting to the list of safety settings for the generation request.
      GenerateContentRequestBuilder GenerateContentRequestBuilder.withSafetySettingForToxicity​(HarmBlockThresholdEnum harmBlockThreshold)
      Adds a safety setting for toxicity with the specified block threshold.
      GenerateContentRequestBuilder GenerateContentRequestBuilder.withSystemInstructions​(String systemInstructions)
      Sets the optional system instructions for the generation request.
      GenerateContentRequestBuilder GenerateContentRequestBuilder.withTool​(Tool tool)
      Adds a tool to the list of tools for the generation request.
      GenerateContentRequestBuilder GenerateContentRequestBuilder.withToolConfig​(ToolConfig toolConfig)
      Sets the optional tool configuration for the generation request.
      GenerateContentRequestBuilder GenerateContentRequestBuilder.withUserInput​(String userInput)
      Sets the required user input for the generation request.

      Constructor Description
      ContentBuilder​(GenerateContentRequestBuilder generateContentRequestBuilder)
      Constructor for the ContentBuilder.
      GenerationConfigBuilder​(GenerateContentRequestBuilder generateContentRequestBuilder)

      ToolBuilder​(GenerateContentRequestBuilder generateContentRequestBuilder)
      Constructor for the ToolBuilder.
      ToolConfigBuilder​(GenerateContentRequestBuilder generateContentRequestBuilder)

    • Uses of GenerateContentRequestBuilder in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.impl

      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.impl that return GenerateContentRequestBuilder 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      GenerateContentRequestBuilder GenerationResourceImpl.generateContentBuilder​(String userInput)
      Creates a new GenerateContentRequestBuilder instance to build a GenerateContentRequest for generating content.

      Creates a new GenerateContentRequestBuilder instance to build a GenerateContentRequest for generating content.
